market_pulse: XS and Encore dominating with 308K+ followers, while LIV maintains 87K momentum with focused nightly lineups (Dom Dolla, Cloonee, Marcos Trous); OMNIA showcasing Latin Sundays strategy with Zedd/DeOrro talent; Palm Tree Beach Club (new) rapidly gaining traction with 232K followers post-May launch.

content_gaps.description: Multiple competitors using 24-48hr countdown stories for events; builds FOMO and engagement
